methodology: Election results from Indiana Secretary of State: https://indianavoters.in.gov/ENRHistorical/ElectionResults. 2024: precinct-level presidential results aggregated directly by district. 2022: county-level US Senate results apportioned to Congressional/Senate districts using census block assignment weights; House districts show actual State House race results. 2020: county-level presidential results apportioned using the same methods; House districts show actual State House race results. IN-Index = average of 2020, 2022, and 2024 margins for Congressional/Senate; House = 2024 presidential margin, averaged with available 2020/2022 race results for unopposed 2024 seats.
